pr-evidence/strict-v1-connector-actions..gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 review approved the patch with no blocking issues; it also spot-checked duplicate vLLM action sidecars are still rejected by backend validation.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Strict V1 release bundles now require vLLM/SGLang connector action sidecars.
Release bundle CLI help and README release checklist document the connector-action requirement.
pr-evidence/strict-v1-connector-actions..why: Release publishing should not omit native connector action descriptors after release evidence has validated them.
